name: Fiddlehead & Ham Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a white sauce by combining butter, flour, milk, and salt in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir until the mixture is smooth and heated through.
3. Add chopped parsley and chives to the sauce.
4. In a casserole dish, alternate layers of ham, cooked fiddleheads, and white sauce until the dish is filled, ending with a layer of sauce on top.
5. Sprinkle the buttered crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for about 30 minutes, or until the sauce bubbles and the crumbs are golden brown.
